summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Web Analytics dashboard integration in Admin Console. All components functioning correctly with mock data fallback.
passed_tests: Login with aminderpro@gmail.com/Admin@123! successfully redirects to Admin Console
Web Analytics menu item appears correctly in ANALYTICS sidebar section
Web Analytics dashboard loads and displays all components
All 4 KPI cards display correctly (Total Visitors, Conversions, Bounce Rate, Avg Session Duration)
Real-time visitors panel shows live chart with active visitor count
Active Sessions panel displays with traffic source breakdown
Click Heatmap section displays with functional page selector dropdown
Heatmap visualization renders with click distribution and page metrics
Traffic Trends chart displays 7-day data correctly
Refresh button works and updates dashboard data
Connection status indicator shows 'Polling' mode (WebSocket fallback)
Mock data fallback works correctly when dashboard endpoints are not available
